description: Frozen input for B3LYP/def2-TZVP single-point benchmark on the screened ATcT subset with n_atoms <= 8. ZPE is recycled from B3LYP/6-31G* (Scott-Radom 0.9806 already applied). Geometries are identical to the original 6-31G* run.
ZPE_NOTE: zpe_eV_recycled is already scaled by 0.9806 (Scott & Radom 1996); use it directly: D_at = E_atoms - E_mol - zpe_eV_recycled
